# vtm Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `base_url` (String) Base URL: 'https://vtm:9070/api' or 'https://sd:8100/api/tmcm/<ver>/instance/<vtm>
- `password` (String) vTM admin password

### Optional

- `test_connectivity` (Boolean) Check that the target vTM is reachable
- `username` (String) vTM admin user
- `verify_ssl_cert` (Boolean) Check that vTM REST interface SSL certificate is trusted
